disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe burning retrosternal chest pain that woke the patient from sleep about two hours after falling asleep
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the pain and where it is?
What were you doing when it started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a hot burning pressure right behind my breastbone. It woke me out of a dead sleep a couple of hours after I went to bed and it scared me half to death.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Onset immediately followed a large, late, high-fat meal with alcohol
trigger_question_examples: What did you eat or drink before bed tonight?
Had you eaten a big meal or had alcohol?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a big pizza pretty late and a few glasses of wine, then went to bed not long after.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sour, acidic fluid regurgitating into the mouth and throat, with sudden watery salty fluid (water brash)
trigger_question_examples: Is anything coming back up into your mouth or throat?
Do you get a sour or acid taste?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — sour acid keeps washing up into my mouth and throat, and every so often my mouth suddenly fills with salty watery spit.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The chest discomfort is clearly worse lying flat and when bending over, and eases with sitting up
trigger_question_examples: Does anything make it better or worse — like lying down or sitting up?
What happens when you lie flat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's much worse the second I lie flat or bend over. Sitting up takes some of the edge off, which is why I won't lie back down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Partial relief of the burning after swallowing liquid antacid
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for it, and did it help?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been swigging antacid all night — it settles it for a bit and then it comes back.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A dry night-time cough and morning throat-clearing over recent weeks
trigger_question_examples: Any cough or throat symptoms lately?
Do you clear your throat a lot in the mornings?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I've had a dry cough at night and I'm always clearing my throat first thing in the morning.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No cold sweat, no pain spreading to the arm or jaw, and no breathlessness reported by the patient
trigger_question_examples: Are you breaking out in a cold sweat, or is the pain spreading to your arm or jaw?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No cold sweat, it's not going into my arm or jaw, and my breathing feels okay — I'm just scared because it's my chest.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The patient has no home ECG, blood-pressure cuff or other measuring device available
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any way to check your heart tracing or blood pressure at home?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't have anything like that here — it's just me at home.
